news.t: Kurv Launches LQID: Seeking to Put Your Cash to Work

overview.description: The Kurv ETF TR Enhanced Short Maturity (LQID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide current income through exposure to a fixed-income portfolio with an options-writing strategy. The fund primarily holds USD-denominated, investment-grade bonds with short-term maturities. LQID was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Kurv.

data.title: Kurv Launches LQID: Seeking to Put Your Cash to Work
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $LQID #Cash--Kurv Investment Management, a provider of tax-efficient, alternative strategies, today announced the launch of the Kurv Enhanced Short Maturity ETF (CBO...
